scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,worker,frontend -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w worker && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,worker,frontend -c cyan,blue,magenta,green "npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json" "npx tsc --noEmit -p backend/tsconfig.json" "npx tsc --noEmit -p worker/tsconfig.json" "npx tsc --noEmit -p frontend/tsconfig.app.json"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install
